selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.

messages.content: You must return JSON only. No markdown, no code fences, no commentary. Return a single JSON object with keys: mode, topic, opinion, reasoning_summary.

Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion: As a 70-year-old retired man living in Los Angeles, I've seen a lot in my time, and discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines can be tricky, especially with my high neuroticism making me worry more than most. I'm not one for big changes or new ideas, given my low openness, so I stick to what I know works from my own life experiences. Being a native-born American and a Christian, I value community and faith, which guide me in these talks. I spend about an hour daily on social media, mostly for my hobbies like photography and baking, but I see how heated these topics get online, so I try to avoid arguments there. In real life, I focus on listening first, sharing my own stories from when I got vaccinated or dealt with health issues, and keeping things calm and respectful, even if others disagree. My moderate agreeableness helps me find common ground, like talking about protecting our families, since I have a child and am in a relationship. I don't push my views, but I stand firm on what I believe, drawing from my faith and personal history. It's all about patience and kindness, avoiding stress that my high neuroticism can bring.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: Derived opinion from persona traits: age 70 suggests life experience; gender man and sexual orientation bisexual not directly relevant; occupation not applicable and retired status imply free time; education level primary school indicates simple, practical approach; parents' education lower suggests humble background; current marital status in a relationship and children 1 emphasize family focus; migration status native-born American and religious beliefs Christianity inform values; psychological feature creative adds personal storytelling; time on social media one hour daily limits online engagement; hobbies photography and baking provide neutral topics; OCEAN scores: low openness (14) leads to traditional views, low conscientiousness (6) means less structured approach, moderate extraversion (47) enables social interaction, moderate agreeableness (39) fosters compromise, high neuroticism (81) increases anxiety in discussions. Opinion integrates these to advocate for calm, faith-based, experience-driven dialogue.
